## Documentation Type

<!-- Please check the appropriate box(es) -->

- [ ] Content Clarification (improve explanation)
- [ ] Typo/Grammar Fix (fix spelling or grammar errors)
- [ ] Missing Information (add missing content)
- [ ] Structure Improvement (reorganize content)
- [ ] Translation (improve or add translations)
- [ ] Example/Code Fix (fix code examples)
- [ ] Other
